---
title: "Day1"
author: "Konstantinos Patelis"
date: "01/12/2021"
output: html_document
---

# Day 1: Sonar Sweep

Solution to https://adventofcode.com/2021/day/1

```{r libraries}

library(tidyverse)
library(slider)

```

```{r data}

data <- read_csv("2021/data/data_day1.txt", col_names = "depth")

```

```{r}

# Single Measurement

data %>% 
  mutate(lag = lag(depth), 
         delta = depth - lag, 
         change = case_when(
           delta > 0 ~ "increase", 
           delta < 0 ~ "decrease",
           delta == 0 ~ "same", 
           is.na(delta) ~ NA_character_
         )) %>% 
  group_by(change) %>% 
  summarise(count = n())

```

```{r}

# Three measurement sliding window

data %>% 
  mutate(window = slide_dbl(depth, ~sum(.x), .before = 1, .after = 1, .complete = TRUE), 
         lag = lag(window), 
         delta = window - lag, 
         change = case_when(
           delta > 0 ~ "increase", 
           delta < 0 ~ "decrease",
           delta == 0 ~ "same", 
           is.na(delta) ~ NA_character_
         )) %>%
  group_by(change) %>% 
  summarise(count = n())

```
